basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Young Professional - I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Young Professional - I Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of ANGRAU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Young Professional - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Woman

qualification.education_qualification: 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or Diploma in Agriculture from ICAR accredited University/college
qualification.details: 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or Diploma in Agriculture from ICAR accredited University/college. Candidates with experience in the field of Agrometeorology & knowledge of computer and recording of meteorological data & analysis, documentation and report writing are preferable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANGRAU Young Professional - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, so candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date. The walk-in interview date is 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or a Diploma in Agriculture from an ICAR accredited University/college.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Woman candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional - I post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ANGRAU Young Professional - I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University, Nandyala, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01/AICRPAM-ATP/2026-27.
